description.content: Server configuration section management.
Get the configuration values for a specific section.
Update the configuration values for a specific section. The provided values are merged with existing configuration.
Partially update configuration values for a specific section. Only the provided keys are updated.
File and directory management including notebooks, files, directories, and checkpoints.
Get the content of a file or directory at the given path. For directories, returns a listing of contents. For notebooks, returns the notebook document. For files, returns the file content.

query.description: Type of content to return. Can be 'file', 'directory', or 'notebook'. If unspecified, the server will determine the type.
Format of the content field. For files, can be 'text' or 'base64'. For notebooks, can be 'json'.
Whether to include the content field. Set to 0 to exclude content, which is useful for listing directories.
Whether to include the hash field. Set to 1 to include a hash of the content.

variable.description: (Required) Path to the file or directory relative to the root directory.

response.name: Contents model for the given path.

variable.description: (Required) Path to the file or directory relative to the root directory.
(Required) Path to the file or directory relative to the root directory.
(Required) Path to the file or directory relative to the root directory.

item.name: Jupyter Notebook Create a new file or directory

request.name: Jupyter Notebook Create a new file or directory

description.content: Create a new file, directory, or notebook at the given path. If no body is provided, creates a new untitled file or directory.

variable.description: (Required) Path where the new content should be created.
(Required) Path where the new content should be created.
(Required) Path where the new content should be created.

item.name: Jupyter Notebook Save or upload content

request.name: Jupyter Notebook Save or upload content

description.content: Save or upload a file, directory, or notebook at the given path. This replaces the content at the given path entirely.

variable.description: (Required) Path of the content to update.
(Required) Path of the content to update.
(Required) Path of the content to update.
(Required) Path of the content to update.

item.name: Jupyter Notebook Rename a file or directory

request.name: Jupyter Notebook Rename a file or directory

description.content: Rename a file or directory by changing its path.

item.name: Jupyter Notebook Delete a file or directory

request.name: Jupyter Notebook Delete a file or directory

description.content: Delete a file or empty directory at the given path.

variable.description: (Required) Path of the content to delete.
(Required) Path of the content to delete.
(Required) Path of the content to delete.
(Required) Path of the content to delete.

description.content: List all checkpoints for the content at the given path.
Create a new checkpoint for the content at the given path.
Delete a specific checkpoint for the content at the given path.

variable.description: (Required) ID of the checkpoint to delete.
(Required) ID of the checkpoint to delete.
(Required) ID of the checkpoint to delete.

description.content: General server information and status endpoints.
Returns the API version and other server information.
Returns the status of the notebook server including kernel and session counts.
Kernel lifecycle management including starting, stopping, interrupting, and restarting kernels.
List all currently running kernels.
Start a new kernel with an optional kernel specification name.
Get the model for a specific kernel by its ID.

item.name: Jupyter Notebook Shut down a kernel

request.name: Jupyter Notebook Shut down a kernel

description.content: Shut down a running kernel by its ID.
Interrupt a running kernel, stopping any currently executing code.
Restart a running kernel. This will kill the current kernel process and start a new one with the same ID.
Kernel specification listing and retrieval for available kernel types.
Get the list of available kernel specifications. Returns the default kernel name and a mapping of kernel spec names to their specifications.

item.name: Jupyter Notebook Get a kernel specification

request.name: Jupyter Notebook Get a kernel specification

description.content: Get the specification for a specific kernel by name.
Session management for associating notebooks with running kernels.
List all currently running notebook sessions.

item.name: Jupyter Notebook Create a new session

request.name: Jupyter Notebook Create a new session

description.content: Create a new session by starting a kernel and associating it with a notebook path.
Get the details of a specific session by its ID.
Update a session, for example to change the associated kernel or notebook path.
Delete a session and shut down its associated kernel.
Terminal session management on the server.
Get the list of currently running terminal sessions.

item.name: Jupyter Notebook Create a new terminal

request.name: Jupyter Notebook Create a new terminal

description.content: Start a new terminal session.
Get details about a specific terminal session.

item.name: Jupyter Notebook Shut down a terminal

request.name: Jupyter Notebook Shut down a terminal

description.content: Shut down a terminal session by its ID.

REST API for managing and interacting with Jupyter Notebook servers, including kernels, sessions, contents (notebooks and files), terminals, and kernel specifications. This API is served by the Jupyter Notebook server (or Jupyter Server) and provides programmatic access to all notebook server functionality.
